title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Cuemath - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Cuemath - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cuemath, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!
